scope: Site validation plan only. No live validation has been performed in R3.

tests.prerequisite: Connection mode, bridge/gateway path, SNMP access, and BRTL36.mib symbol tree confirmed.
tests.input: SNMP GET for CenterAlarmMom and SDR AlarmMom objects under normal device condition.
tests.expectedResult: Normal value captured with no unexpected active bits.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Connection mode, raw OID, raw value, decoded bits, timestamp.

tests.prerequisite: Safe vendor/customer test alarm procedure approved.
tests.input: SNMP GET while a controlled alarm is active.
tests.expectedResult: Expected AlarmMom bit is set and matches vendor/customer observation.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw OID, raw active value, expected bit, vendor tool screenshot if available.

tests.prerequisite: Trap receiver path and bheBRTL36Trap behavior configured.
tests.input: Controlled alarm transition from clear to active.
tests.expectedResult: Trap received with bheBRTL36Trap fields sufficient for normalization.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Trap packet, varbinds, trap timestamp, source endpoint.

tests.input: Observe configured trap receiver during heartbeat interval.
tests.expectedResult: Heartbeat trap received or vendor confirms unsupported behavior.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Trap sample or vendor unsupported confirmation.

tests.expectedResult: Polling and/or trap evidence shows transition to clear.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw clear value, clear trap if supported, active-to-clear correlation.

tests.prerequisite: Approved test window and bridge/gateway path confirmed.
tests.input: Controlled bridge/gateway disconnect or service stop.
tests.expectedResult: EDGE distinguishes gateway failure from BRTL32 equipment alarm.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Timeout evidence, bridge logs, restore evidence.

tests.input: SNMP request with intentionally incorrect community/security details under approved test conditions.
tests.expectedResult: Request is rejected without data leakage.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Rejection response/timeout, device/gateway log if available.

tests.objective: Unsupported OID returns No Such Object.
tests.prerequisite: Known unsupported BRTL36.mib object selected safely.
tests.input: SNMP GET for unsupported candidate OID.
tests.expectedResult: No Such Object or equivalent unsupported response is captured.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw request/response and selected MIB symbol.

tests.prerequisite: RF metric symbols and numeric OIDs confirmed.
tests.input: SNMP GET for forward power, reflected power, return loss, RSSI, or power manager status.
tests.expectedResult: Metric value, unit, scale, and timestamp are captured.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Raw OID, raw value, decoded value, unit, scale.

tests.objective: Asset identity mapping using serial number / identifier.
tests.prerequisite: Serial number and identifier symbols confirmed.
tests.input: SNMP GET for bheBRTL36SerialNumber and bheBRTL36Iden.
tests.expectedResult: Device identity maps to customer asset ID and location.
tests.evidenceToCapture: Serial number, identifier, customer asset ID, site/location mapping.
